dialogos.texto_en: Is this American Village?\nThe town layout is somewhat unusual.
According to the travel guide,\nit was modeled after shopping malls\non the west coast of America.
(I've been hanging out with these quintuplets for\n almost a year and a half now. We've had a few chances\n to get to know each other well during that time.)
(I'm a different person from when we first met.\n I should be able to tell them apart\n a little better by now%p-2;――%p;)
Look!\nThere's a Ferris Wheel over there?!
There's so many kinds of shops lined up on this street. \nThis looks like a really interesting place.
It seems like it would be difficult\nto see everything, though...
(...I had faith and accepted the challenge,\n but what the heck, I have no idea what's going on!)
(If this is the quintuplets' serious disguise,\n I may have been a little naive...)
Uesugi-kun, what's wrong?\nYou've been silent for a while now.
Huh?\nOh, it's nothing.
(What am I being so weak for?\n Wasn't love supposed to help me tell them apart?)
(If my feelings are genuine...\n I'm sure I can do that.)
(I'm going to overcome this challenge,\n and confidently transform my feelings!)
Ah!\nThere's a guide map over there!
This place is bigger than I thought.
Yeah...
(Just like on that hot springs trip.\n If they realize my intentions and prepare for them,\n I'll be in trouble.)
(...Alright, let's give it a try.)
Hey, have you decided\nwhere to start looking around?
Well, with so much here,\nit's hard to choose.
Then why don't you guys point\nto the place you want to go first?
Okay.\nThen, on the count of three.
One, two, three!
There's an ice cream shop in this area\nthat I absolutely have to visit.
Also, there are snack and dessert shops\nunique to Okinawa.\nWe absolutely can't miss them!
...I see, I get it now.
Indeed so.
(If they were their usual selves, they would all be \n pointing to different places.\n Yet, they all pointed to the exact same place.)
(In other words, I shouldn't try any tricks.)
Do you have anywhere you want to go, Uesugi-kun?
Oh, now that you mention it,\nI hadn't really thought about it.\nI was just planning on wandering around with you guys.
With this much space,\nwe don't need to move around as a group.
So, where should we go first?
Definitely the ice cream shop!
Do you think we can ride that Ferris Wheel?
It seems like it would be fun\njust to look around the town.
...And I'm free to do what I want, right?
Yes.\nPlease go wherever you like.
(It's convenient for me that they've split up.)
(Should be easier to handle\n than everyone being together in the same environment.\n Now, who should I start with...)
